title: FFTA results export
subtitle: The results file to upload to the FFTA extranet.

cards.exportText: Uses the refactored PHP engine extracted from the FR set. The behavior remains compatible with the current Ianseo export.
cards.tnrActiveText: Generates the TXT from the active tournament then compares it to a reference .txt file.
cards.tnrDatasetText: Loads a type dataset, generates TXT using the portable JS engine, then compares it to the expected file.

status.success: File ready. Upload it to the FFTA extranet.

intro: This module generates the official results file to upload to the FFTA extranet. Pick the level (shown on your mandate), then download.
